THE DEFENDANT HAS A FAMILY EMERGENCY. INFORMATION WAS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT VERIFYING THE DEFENDANT BOOKED A FLIGHT FOR MARCH 08, 2017 AT 10:50AM FROM CALIFORNIA TO TENNESSEE.
